aiCommentCN: 行情像初恋，没消息也会想
aiCommentEN: Market is like a crush, always on mind
aiSummaryCN:
【今日观点】
比特币市场情绪谨慎。
【驱动因素】
美联储政策、ETF资金、美元指数。
【市场展望】
未来24-72小时可能维持震荡走势。
【一句提醒】
关注政策变动带来的市场波动。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin market sentiment is cautious.
[Key Drivers]
Federal Reserve policy, ETF funds, US dollar index.
[Outlook]
The market may fluctuate in the next 24-72 hours.
[Reminder]
Be aware of market fluctuations caused by policy changes.
